headline: Earnings Preview: Pinduoduo
summary:
Pinduoduo (NASDAQ:PDD) is set to give its latest quarterly earnings report on Friday, 2021-11-26. Here's what investors need to know before the announcement.
Analysts estimate that Pinduoduo will likely report an Earnings Per Share (EPS) of $0.02.

headline: Is It Time To Short High-Growth Stocks Amid Rising Treasury Yields?
summary: Stocks of high-growth names on the Nasdaq took a severe hit during Wednesday’s trading session.

headline: CNBC's Final Trades: Dicks Sporting Goods, Apple And These 2 Financial Stocks
summary: On CNBC’s “Halftime Report Final Trades,” Joseph Terranova of Virtus Investment Partners named Virtu Financial Inc (NASDAQ: VIRT) as his pick.

headline: A Farewell To Mr. Goxx, The Hamster That Outperformed Warren Buffett
summary: Mr. Goxx — a hamster that traded cryptocurrencies via livestream on Amazon Inc's (NASDAQ: AMZN) Twitch platform and whose trading performance beat Warren Buffett himself — has left us.
